findings.title: Hardcoded admin API key and service passphrase
findings.description: Hardcoded ADMIN_API_KEY and SERVICE_PASSPHRASE string constants used for privileged authentication bypass

findings.title: Custom weak hash function used for password storage
findings.description: Custom non-cryptographic hash function used for password storage instead of a proper password hashing algorithm

findings.title: No rate limiting on login endpoint
findings.description: Login handler accepts unlimited authentication attempts without rate limiting or account lockout

findings.title: Hardcoded service passphrase bypasses token verification
findings.description: Token verification handler accepts hardcoded SERVICE_PASSPHRASE as valid authentication

findings.title: Password reset token exposed in API response
findings.description: Password reset token returned directly in API response instead of being sent via email only
